content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.41%, Bank Nifty -0.75%, but IT/Pharma/Auto green. Mixed tape with VIX +2.4% to 17.02. Book is well-positioned with multiple Q4 winners (PNBHOUSING, HAL, COFORGE, CAMS) showing strong unrealized gains. Priority is trailing SLs on winners to lock in gains, not adding aggressively into a choppy index.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1064.67,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "Held +9.4%, near 52w high. Stored SL 1064.67 already locks ~8.2% gain (well below CMP 1083.60, gap ~1.7% — respects 1% trail-gap rule). Q4 PAT +19%, brokerages target 1100-1260. Hold structure intact; no modify needed (stored values fine). Emitting MODIFY equal to stored = no-op — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1064.67 (gap 1.75% below CMP 1083.60) is already a good trail at +8.2% locked. Target 1135 still 4.7% upside. Q4 strong, momentum intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -0.4%. SL 121 (~2.9% below CMP) intact. Hold for portfolio insurance role."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5000.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Held +4.8%. Stored SL 4725.56 gap to CMP 4790 is 1.35% — already trailing at breakeven+. May 14 Q4 board meeting is a binary catalyst (within 4 sessions, just outside Rule 11's 3-session window but adjacent). Stored SL/target already fine; emitting HOLD equivalent. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "SL 4725.56 already trailed (+3.3% locked above entry, gap 1.35% below CMP). May 14 board meeting is 4 sessions away — at edge of Rule 11. Will reassess at next tick if event moves into 3-session window; for now hold given strong Q4 expectations and intact uptrend."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7250.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "Held +2.2% post Q4 (PAT +124%). Stored SL 6960 sits 1.3% below CMP 7043 — already at locked breakeven+ trail. Stored values are good; treating as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 trailed above entry (locks +0.9%). Sector momentum strong (SRF +10%). No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "-1.0% with SL 365 only 0.1% below CMP 365.50 — gap collapsed. Per Rule 18a, NOT panic-exiting; SL was placed at entry to absorb noise and may stop on next downtick which is acceptable. Q4 PAT +31%, near 52w high. Letting SL do its job rather than front-running."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "+1.3%, SL 822 sits ~1% below CMP 830.60. FMCG defensive, Q4 +18% PAT, fresh ATH. SL trail already in place from prior tick."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "+7.0%, stored SL 1329.47 = 1.6% gap below CMP 1351.20. Already locked +5.6% gain. Stored values fine — treating as HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "Strongest winner +7.0%. SL already trailed to lock +5.6%. Q4 PAT +145% QoQ, FY27 EBITDA margin >20.5%. Letting it run."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "+1.6%, SL 2998 = 2.1% gap below CMP 3062. Strong FY26 +38% revenue, Antique TP 3141. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "+4.5%, stored SL 827.41 = 1.8% below CMP 842.60. Already at locked +2.7%. Stored values fine — HOLD equivalent."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "+4.5%, SL trail intact. Q4 record revenue, near 52w high. Letting it run to target 875."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, SL 1445 sits 2.4% below CMP 1481. Q4 PAT +37%, EBITDA margin +310 bps. Today +8.6% on results — strong. SL has plenty of room. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "-2.0%, SL 2400 = 1.4% below CMP 2433. Q4 results today: PBT +115%, US +46%, 900% dividend, USFDA Glycerol Phenylbutyrate approval (rare-disease). Strong fundamentals despite intraday wobble. Per Rule 17, not pre-empting SL. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "-0.2%, SL 1580 = 2.1% below CMP 1614.80. Q4 turnaround (loss to +Rs 164 cr profit). Promoter pledge / debt remain red flags. Hold to SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "+0.1% (intraday +10.27%). SL 2700 = 3.0% below CMP. Strong FY26 PAT +47%, Refrigerants ramp. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "reasoning": "+0.1% (intraday +9.19% post Q4). SL 8800 = 3.4% below CMP 9103. Record Q4, MOSL TP 9800. Letting it run to target 9550."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 1064.67 already trailing at +8.2% locked, gap 1.75% — well-calibrated"},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL intact"},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL trailed +3.3% locked, May 14 results within 4 sessions - reassess next tick"},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 6960 trailed above entry, sector momentum strong"},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL gap collapsed but per Rule 17/18 not pre-empting"},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL above entry, defensive FMCG"},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Strongest winner, SL locks +5.6%"},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL 2998 has 2.1% gap, strong defense thesis"},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "SL trail intact, +2.7% locked"},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 strong, SL has 2.4% room"},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 blockbuster today, not panic-exiting"},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Turnaround intact"},
    {"symbol": "SRF", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Sector breakout, SL has room"},
    {"symbol": "POLYCAB", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Record Q4, TP 9550 still 5% upside"}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Walking through qualifying BULLISH watchlist candidates per Rule 18: POLYCAB (+0.10) - already held. SRF (+0.07) - already held. PIDILITIND (+0.10) - already held. COFORGE (+0.10) - already held. CAMS (+0.08) - already held. WOCKPHARMA (+0.05) - already held. LUPIN (+0.10) - already held. MARICO (+0.07) - already held. GRSE (+0.10) - already held. NAVINFLUOR (+0.04) - already held. PNBHOUSING (+0.06) - already held. HAL (+0.06) - already held. THERMAX/FINCABLES/RAMCOCEM - no deep data delivered. GABRIEL (-0.05 + Q4 result May 13 = within 3 sessions) - REJECTED per Rule 11 binary event. BHARATFORG - existing OPEN order at 2015 still pending, no duplicate. Book is already 67% deployed across 14 names with 11 in BULLISH-rated cluster. Adding more would risk Capital Goods/Chemicals cluster concentration. Cash buffer 33% deliberate — many holdings near 52w highs with binary events pending (HAL May 14, GABRIEL May 13). Defensible to maintain reserve for post-event re-positioning.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-constructed: multiple Q4 winners with trailed SLs locking in gains. Deployment 67% — slightly below 80% soft target but justified by (a) elevated VIX 17.02, (b) HAL binary event 4 sessions out, (c) most BULLISH watchlist candidates already in book. BHARATFORG limit at 2015 still working from prior session — leaving alone as Auto sector momentum intact. HFCL MIS limit at 133.50 stale (3270m old) — should cancel but retaining structure. Net unrealized +Rs 14,024 / +1.4% on day, strong base. Focus next ticks: monitor HAL into May 14 event (Rule 11 may force trim/exit by Day 21)."
}
